decisions.decision: TukarMejaModal is FULLSCREEN (fixed inset-0 z-50), NOT shadcn Dialog
decisions.rationale: Figma spec confirmed — modal menutup seluruh layar, tidak bisa di-dismiss tanpa PIN

decisions.decision: Max 3 percobaan PIN Tukar Meja (NOT 10 like kader lockout)
decisions.rationale: Figma spec: 3x → disabled → Master Overrule by Puskesmas via ManajemenPengguna

decisions.decision: On Tukar Meja PIN success: navigate to /kader/pelayanan (PelayananGateway) NOT LockScreenPage
decisions.rationale: Figma spec: kembali ke PelayananGateway → pilih meja baru

decisions.decision: PelayananHariHPage needs confirmation modal before entering meja
decisions.rationale: Figma spec: tap meja → modal konfirmasi → Confirm → setActiveMeja + navigate
User-confirmed from Figma spec; different from kader login PIN (123456)
